memory.summary: I have free time today with low energy and sleep debt, so attending a leisure event seems like a better immediate option than starting the urgent term project.
Spending half an hour on a trivial task yielded minimal progress, confirming that this low-energy state is better suited for leisure or rest than meaningful work.
Spending 1.5 hours on trivial tasks with minimal progress confirms that my current low energy and sleep debt make meaningful project work unfeasible right now.

Another hour on trivial tasks yields minimal progress, confirming that my fatigue and sleep debt make meaningful work impossible right now.
Working on trivial tasks again only yields minimal progress, confirming that my severe fatigue and sleep debt make meaningful work impossible right now.
Spending more time on trivial tasks yields negligible progress, confirming that my severe fatigue and sleep debt make meaningful work impossible right now.
Spending another hour on this trivial task confirms that my severe fatigue and sleep debt make meaningful progress impossible, even for instant wins.
Spending 1.5 hours on trivial tasks yielded only 0.01 progress, confirming that my severe fatigue and sleep debt make meaningful work impossible right now.
